prompt: A high-quality Japanese food advertisement banner. The background features a warm, softly blurred wooden table with golden rice stalks. On the center-right, {argument name="main dish" default="a bowl of steaming white rice topped with a raw egg yolk and soy sauce being poured over it"} sits in a vertically striped ceramic bowl. To the right, a small white dish contains exactly 3 slices of pickles (one green cucumber, one orange carrot, one white radish), alongside a blurred wooden miso soup bowl. In the top-left corner, large elegant Japanese typography reads {argument name="headline text" default="甘み、つや、粘り。三拍子そろったおいしさ。"} with a smaller subheadline below reading {argument name="subheadline text" default="日本の食卓に、最高の一杯を。"}. In the bottom-left corner, a 5kg plastic bag of rice is displayed with the label {argument name="product name" default="新潟県産 こしひかり"}. In the top-right corner, a circular gold foil award badge displays the text {argument name="badge text" default="米の食味ランキング 特A 獲得"}. Small fine print runs along the bottom right edge. The lighting is warm, appetizing, and professional, highlighting the glossy texture of the rice and egg.

breakdown.creativeCore: Japanese Rice Advertisement Banner：Generates a professional food advertisement banner featuring a rice dish, product packaging, and promotional typography.
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
